headline: PayPal Jumps 5%, Affirm Rockets 6%, SoFi Rises 4% in a Broad Payments and Fintech Rebound
summary: The payments and fintech sector is catching a meaningful bid on Monday, with three of its most actively traded names posting solid gains. PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) stock is jumping 6% to $48, Affirm (NASDAQ:AFRM) stock is advancing 7% to $52, and SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) stock is rising 4% to $17. All three names have been among ... PayPal Jumps 5%, Affirm Rockets 6%, SoFi Rises 4% in a Broad Payments and Fintech Rebound

headline: Digital Payment Today - Balancing Digital Growth With Cash Access For Financial Inclusion
summary: Despite the increasing dominance of digital payments, cash continues to hold a vital role in ensuring financial inclusion and economic resilience, particularly for lower-income, rural, and tech-excluded consumers. According to the "Future of Cash in a Digital Economy" report, global trends indicate a reduction in cash usage; however, recent global events have led governments to reconsider fully cashless ecosystems. The preservation of cash accessibility remains critical to safeguarding...

headline: Who Really Runs Stablecoin Settlement? A Structural Analysis
summary: On-chain data shows how stablecoin infrastructure replaced correspondent banking as the settlement layer for Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal.
